tools.name: run_agent
tools.description: Start an agent on a task; return the answer or a session handle to wait on. ``agent`` from list_agents.

tools.name: wait_for_session
tools.description: Poll a session: with ``wait`` long-poll for the answer, else return the current snapshot.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List agents the caller can run: their org's agents plus the public ``h/`` ones.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a follow-up message to a running session.

tools.name: cancel_session
tools.description: Cancel a session; a no-op if it does not exist or already finished.

tools.name: share_session
tools.description: Make a session publicly readable and return its absolute share URL.
